prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is H-302 Charging & diagnostics within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.3 Refrigeration Circuit. The observed field condition is: charged to "beer-can cold" instead of subcool/superheat targets. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors mfr charging charts.
title: T4 H-302 Fault diagnosis
